testTitle: HP Police Constable Official Paper (27 March 2022)
customInstructions: Dis na di Ofishal Pribyɔs Yia Pepa (PYP) fɔ HP Polis Kɔnstebul we dɛn bin du pan 27 Mach 2022.
Tota Kwɛstyɔn dɛn: 80, Tota Mak dɛn: 80, Tota Tɛm: 60 Minit.
Yu go gɛt +1 Mak fɔ ɛvri kɔrɛkt ansa.
Lida, dɛn nɔ bin gɛt nɛgetiv makin fɔ dis patikula egzam.
Dɛn kwɛstyɔn ya na di sem wan dɛn we bin kam pan di rial egzam.

questions.questionEn: Which among the following states of India has the largest coal reserve?

questions.questionEn:
In each of questions given below, a sentence is given with three words in bold. Choose the option which gives the correct sequence of those words to make the sentence grammatically and contextually correct.
The H.P. Ordinance not only (A) CONFLICT guaranteed fundamental rights but is also in (B) VIOLATES with (C) EXISTING personal laws.
The Supreme Court has been asking states to (A) RESERVATION quantifiable data to (B) JUSTIFY their level of (C) PRODUCE.
Choose the correctly spelt word:
Choose the correctly spelt word:

Select the option which best expresses the sentence in Active/Passive voice.
Somebody told me that there had been an explosion in the Mall.
options: I was told by somebody about the explosion in the Mall.
I was told about the explosion in the Mall.
I was informed that there was an explosion in the Mall.
I was told by somebody that there had been an explosion in the Mall.

questions.questionEn:
Choose the correct option for sentence improvement if any.
He has fallen out with the girl he wanted to marry.

Choose the correct option for sentence improvement if any.
It is the time the three years old is learning how to read and write.
Choose the option having similar meaning to Capital word: PIOUS
Choose the option having similar meaning to Capital word: REPLENISH
Choose the option correct for the sentence: A hater of knowledge and learning

Choose the correct option for filling up the blanks.
In ____ to picking up milk from the grocery store we also need to get some bread because my cousin ate all of it in past week.

Select the most appropriate option to change the sentence from Direct Speech to Reported Speech and vice versa.
“I am going out tonight” Luxmi said.
options: Luxmi said that she was going out tonight.
Luxmi said that she was going out that night.
Luxmi said she was going out that night.
Luxmi said that she will be going out that night.

questions.questionEn: The King ordered that they should celebrate their victory.
options: The King said, “One should celebrate their victory”.
The King said, “I order everyone to celebrate”.
The King said, “We should celebrate our victory”.

questions.questionEn:
The given phrase in bold may or may not contain an error. The options following can replace the incorrect phrase. The correct phrase that is to be replaced will be your answer.
Everything is funny as long as it (IS HAPPENING TOO) somebody else.

Choose the correct meaning of the idiom as underlined.
Everyone likes her since she always remains (in high spirits).
He was a King who ruled his subjects (with a high hand).
30% apples out of 450 are rotten. How many apples are in good condition?
questions.questionHi: 450 सेबों में से 30% सड़े हुए हैं। कितने सेब अच्छी स्तिथि में हैं?

questions.questionEn: Veena obtained an amount of Rs. 8376 as simple interest on a certain amount at 8% p.a. after 6 years. What is the amount invested by Veena?
questions.questionHi: वीणा एक निश्चित राशि को 8% वार्षिक दर पर रखती है। तो उसे 6 वर्ष बाद साधारण व्याज के 8376 रु मिलते हैं। वीणा द्वारा कितनी राशि निवेश की गई?

questions.questionEn: In a rhombus, if its diagonals are 19 cm and 13 cm, its area will be?
questions.questionHi: एक समचतुर्भुज में अगर इसके विकर्ण 19 cm तथा 13 cm है तो इसका क्षेत्रफल कितना होगा?

questions.questionEn: If the area of a circular garden is 15400 m², then its perimeter is?
questions.questionHi: अगर एक गोलाकार (वृत्त) बगीचे का क्षेत्रफल 15400 m² है तो उसका परिमाप कितना होगा?

questions.questionEn: A student goes to School at the rate of 2½ km/hr and reaches 6 min late. If he travels at the speed of 3km/hr, he is 10 min early. What is the distance to School?
questions.questionHi: एक विद्यार्थी 2½ km/hr की गति से स्कूल जाता है तो वो 6 मिनट देरी से पहुँचता है। अगर वो 3 km/hr की गति से यात्रा करता है तो वह 10 मिनट जल्दी पहुंच जाता है। स्कूल तक दूरी कितनी है?

questions.questionEn: Find value of x in: 28.5 x 34 + 2320 ÷ 8 = (36)² - x
If HCF (a,b) = 15 and a x b = 1800 then LCM (a, b) is?
questions.questionHi: अगर (a, b) का उच्चतम आम कारक 15 है तथा a x b = 1800 है तो (a, b) का न्यूनतम सामान्य कारक बताएं।

questions.questionEn: 75% of 2 is equal to?
questions.questionHi: 2 का 75% किसके बराबर है?

questions.questionEn: Which one of the following is different from the rest?
questions.questionHi: निम्नलिखित में कौन सा अन्य से भिन्न है?

questions.questionEn: In a code ‘TOGETHER’ is denoted by ‘RQEGRICT’ then ‘FRIEND’ will be denoted by?
questions.questionHi: एक कोड में ‘TOGETHER’ को ‘RQEGRICT’ से दर्शाया जाता है, तो ‘FRIEND' को उसी कोड में किससे दर्शाया जायेगा?

questions.questionEn: Ram’s position is thirteenth from upwards in a class of 53 students. What will be his position from downwards?
questions.questionHi: 53 छात्रों की एक कक्षा में राम का स्थान ऊपर से 13वाँ है। उसका स्थान नीचे से कौन सा होगा?

questions.questionEn: February 1, 2009 was Sunday. What day of the week was on March 1st, 2011?
questions.questionHi: फरवरी 1, 2009 को रविवार था। मार्च 1, 2011 को सप्ताह का कौन सा दिन होगा?

questions.questionEn: If Everest is to Himalayas, then Mount Abu is to?
questions.questionHi: अगर ऐवरेस्ट का सम्बन्ध हिमालय से है, तो माउंट आबू का सम्बन्ध किससे होगा?
options: None of these / इनमे से कोई नहीं

questions.questionEn:
Eight boxes are placed one above the other. Only two boxes are placed between box U&T. Only one box is placed between box T&R. Only two boxes are placed between boxes R&V. Box V is placed below box R. Three boxes are placed between boxes S&Q. Both S&Q boxes are placed above box T. Box W is placed below box V. No box is placed between box S&P.

How many boxes are placed between box T and box S?
questions.questionHi:
8 डब्बे एक दूसरे पर रखे गए हैं। U एवं T डब्बों के मध्य केवल दो डब्बे हैं। T एवं R डब्बों के मध्य केवल एक डब्बा है। R एवं V डब्बों के मध्य केवल दो डब्बे हैं। डब्बा V, डब्बा R के नीचे है। S एवं Q डब्बों के मध्य तीन डब्बे हैं। S एवं Q डब्बे, डब्बा T के ऊपर रखे हैं। डब्बा W, डब्बा V के नीचे रखा है। S एवं P डब्बों के मध्य कोई डब्बा नहीं है।

डब्बा T एवं डब्बा S के मध्य कितने डब्बे हैं?

questions.questionEn: Which of the following box is placed at the bottom most position?
questions.questionHi: निम्न में से कौन सा डब्बा सबसे नीचे है?
options: None of these / इनमे से कोई नहीं

questions.questionEn: How many boxes are there between box W and box R?
questions.questionHi: डब्बा W एवं R के मध्य कितने डब्बे हैं?

questions.questionEn: If dog is called cat, cat is called lion, lion is called ox, ox is called cock, cock is called elephant and elephant is called donkey, then farmer ploughs with which animal?
questions.questionHi: यदि कुत्ते को बिल्ली कहा जाये, बिल्ली को शेर, शेर को बैल, बैल को मुर्गा, मुर्गे को हाथी तथा हाथी को गधा कहा जाये, तो बताइये कि एक किसान किससे खेती करेगा?

questions.questionEn: Ram is taller than Shyam but not as much as Rajan. Arjun is taller than Sohan who is shorter than Shyam. Who is the shortest?
questions.questionHi: राम, श्याम से ऊँचा है, पर राजन जितना नहीं। अर्जुन, सोहन से ऊँचा है जो श्याम से छोटा है। सबसे छोटा कौन है?

questions.questionEn: Shyam Lal goes 8 Kms in the west from a certain point. Then he moves to his right and goes 8 Kms. In the end he goes 25 Kms. in south east direction. How far is he from his starting point?
questions.questionHi: किसी निश्चित बिंदु से श्याम लाल पश्चिम में 8 कि.मी. चला। फिर दायीं ओर मुड़कर 8 कि.मी. चला। आखिर में वह दक्षिण-पूर्व दिशा में 25 कि.मी. चला। वह अपने प्रारंभिक बिंदु से कितना दूर है?
options: None of these / इनमे से कोई नहीं

questions.questionEn: If ‘a’ means ‘+’, ‘b’ means ‘-‘, ‘c’ means ‘÷’ and ‘d’ means ‘x’ then 16a4b3c4d2=?
questions.questionHi: यदि ‘a’ का मतलब ‘+’, ‘b’ का मतलब ‘-‘, ‘c’ का मतलब ‘÷’ तथा ‘d’ का मतलब ‘x’ तो 16a4b3c4d2=?

questions.questionEn: Fill in the blanks with Correct option: 200, 193, 179, 158, _, 95
Fill in the blanks with Correct option: 51, 49, 44, 42, 37, _
Find the odd one out: Ranjit Sagar lake, Gobind Sagar lake, Maharana Pratap Sagar, Prashar lake.
questions.questionHi: अजीब / अलग का चयन करें: रणजीत सागर झील, गोबिंद सागर झील, महाराणा प्रताप सागर, पराशर झील ।
options: Gobind Sagar lake / गोबिंद सागर झील
Maharana Pratap Sagar / महाराणा प्रताप सागर
Ranjit Sagar lake / रणजीत सागर झील

questions.questionEn: If in a code ‘CAB’ is written as 312, ‘BIG’ is written as 297, then ‘FEED’ will be written in code as-
questions.questionHi: एक कोड में यदि ‘CAB’ को 312 लिखा जाता है, ‘BIG’ को 297 लिखा जाता है, तो इसी कोड में ‘FEED’ को कैसे लिखा जायेगा?
